hassan-v-abc-international-bank-2025-10-.lesson: Pro-se AI filings trigger costs orders; tribunals treat 46 bad citations as reckless conduct warranting fees.

gilles-dulac-c-ville-de-gatineau-2025-10.lesson: Quebec tribunals routinely flag pro-se AI citations as nonexistent; verify every QCTAQ reference on CanLII.

visca-v-halton-district-school-board-202.lesson: HRTO applicants citing phantom cases face exclusion of authorities; CanLII verification is non-negotiable.

mr-m-peters-v-driver-and-vehicle-standar.lesson: AI summaries of real ET judgments diverge materially; pull the full judgment before relying on any summary.

vivek-singha-v-metal-manufactures-2025-1.lesson: FWC catches fabricated FWC citations instantly; verify every tribunal number before submission.

sap-a-15582025-ecliesapa20251558-2025-10.lesson: Spanish appellate courts are now referring lawyers to the Colegio for fabricated quotes; always pull the original STS text.

14-os-9525i-2025-10-07.lesson: Austria's OGH declines to address AI-fabricated Fehlzitate entirely; unverified citations forfeit the argument.

ren-v-area-09-2025-10-07.lesson: BC PAAB imposes nominal costs and code-of-conduct breaches on pro-se AI users; expect monetary follow-on.

ak-v-secretary-of-state-for-the-home-dep.lesson: UK Upper Tribunal sends ChatGPT-drafted grounds straight to the SRA; immigration grounds need partner sign-off on every cite.

kmg-wires-private-limited-v-the-national.lesson: Bombay HC quashed a tax assessment built on AI-fabricated precedents; quasi-judicial officers must verify before citing.

delisle-v-canadian-association-of-profes.lesson: When 45 of 51 cited cases are phantom, the Board simply disregards the pleading; volume is not substance.

warwick-econometrics-ltd-v-the-universit.lesson: Google AI Overviews are now a citation source for the unwary; treat overview-style results as unverified leads only.

backhaus-v-area-01-2025-10-02.lesson: BC PAAB's Code of Conduct now requires AI disclosure; nondisclosure alone draws a recorded caution.

fernando-oliveira-v-ryanair-dac-2025-10-.lesson: Irish WRC labels AI-driven phantom citations 'abuse of process'; expect dismissal on prima facie grounds.

specter-aviation-limited-v-laprade-2025-.lesson: Quebec CS is imposing 5,000$ art.342 sanctions on pro-se AI filers; low bar for fabrication-based costs.

hogan-v-treasury-board-2025-10-01.lesson: AI fabricates statutory text, not just cases; verify the actual wording of every section quoted.

anpv-sapv-v-secretary-of-state-for-the-h.lesson: Copilot is now generating fake country-guidance authorities; immigration counsel must re-check every CG reference.

tajudin-bin-gulam-rasul-and-another-v-su.lesson: Singapore HC orders personal costs and client notification for AI-fabricated cites; disclosure to the client is now part of the remedy.

sonkin-v-roll-profile-ltd-2025-09-29.lesson: Twenty fabricated citations draw four-figure fines in Israeli labour courts; volume of errors directly scales penalty.

ilan-harush-v-roee-alfasi-2025-09-28.lesson: Israeli courts now disallow costs entirely when fabricated AI cites are in the record; fees are the first line of defense.
